subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Sirr al-Tankis
subcodes.first_line: The matters mentioned were presented to the Most Holy Court, and this is what hath been sent down from the heaven of Command: We have heard that which thou didst call upon God concerning what He taught thee aforetime... And as for the phrases attributed to Shaykh Ahmad-i-Ahsá'í [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مطالب مذکوره در ساحت اقدس معروض افتاد هذا ما نزل من سمآء الأمر قد سمعنا ما نادیت به الله بما علمک من قبل... و اما در فقرهٴ عباراتی که منسوب بجناب شیخ احمد احسائی
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @petitions to authorities, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
